app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.59 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for proxied CinemaOS playback, richer MP4/MKV parsing, and better Server J reliability.
releaseNotes: Server J now uses the download-proxy stream resolver for proxied CinemaOS MP4 and MKV playback
Peach direct playback remains available as a later fallback instead of the primary Server J path
The stream parser now reads extractData links, nested MP4 downloads, MKV files, MKV v2 links, and captions
Proxied MP4 and MKV links are routed to ExoPlayer as progressive media streams
Playback headers now preserve identity encoding and browser-compatible request headers for proxy streams
Large 2160p and HEVC MKV links remain selectable but are no longer auto-picked first
The sandbox embedded fallback now uses sandbox-stream.lovable.app
Embedded fallback fullscreen expansion now fills the player surface
Player exit now restores the previous orientation instead of forcing portrait
Sports stays on cube-trove-api.lovable.app with mobile browser headers and in-app popup routing
Provider parser tests were refreshed for download-proxy, Peach movie, and Peach TV response shapes

items.title: The Cube 2.0.59
items.message: Server J now uses proxied CinemaOS MP4/MKV streams with richer parser coverage.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked. Breaking changes, UI shifts, and rough edges are part of the process right now.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
